name: Rushikesh Sontakke
summary: EECS undergraduate at National Tsing Hua University specializing in machine learning and computer vision, with experience building and deploying deep learning, predictive ML, and full-stack systems.
evidence: Improved OCR accuracy from 63% to 79.6% across 403 drug classes.
Built a YOLOv8, OpenCV, and OpenOCR pill-recognition pipeline with Flask and Docker.
Built an XGBoost and SHAP student-performance pipeline over 6,607 records.
Mentored more than 20 students as a Python teaching assistant.
Built and deployed a React and Firebase real-time chat application.
